case_title: ZIESCH, HERBERT W. vs. THOMPSON, DERREL

docket_entries.description: ALEX SALDAMANDO, JUDGE, BPAYTON, CLERK, VPAPALE, CSR. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, PLNTF APPEARING BY DAVID G. MENDEZ, ESQ DEF DERREL THOMPSON APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND THE TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD, I.E. JUDGMENT FOR PLNT FOR $3,012 AND RETURN OF PREMISES. WRIT OF EVICTION MAY ISSUE, BUT IS STAYED TO 5 MAY 99. PARTY WAIVES COSTS. DEF AGREES NO OTHER PERSON IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION
